text.title: Trello Kanban Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Trello Kanban end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: create-board
step.action: Create one board with 5 canonical columns.

step.name: set-wip
step.decision-gate: If WIP repeatedly violated, raise limit OR cut scope.

step.name: install-powerups
step.action: Install ≤2 Power-Ups; document which + why in board description.

step.name: write-butler
step.action: Encode ≤10 Butler rules; document each in board description.

step.name: publish-policy
step.action: Pin policy snapshot to ops doc; review quarterly.
